questions.question: Describe the impact of Information and Communication Technologies (ICTs) on the environment during the Industrial Revolution. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the changes in energy consumption, e-waste generation, and carbon footprint

questions.question: What role do green ICT strategies play in reducing the carbon footprint of organizations? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the benefits of virtualization, cloud computing, and energy-efficient hardware

questions.question: Compare the environmental benefits of adopting Green ICT technologies (e.g. LED lighting, energy-efficient servers) versus traditional ICT infrastructure. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the reduction in energy consumption, e-waste generation, and greenhouse gas emissions
